stonetop.summary: Eons ago, over a span beyond reckoning.

sections.heading: The Primordial Age
sections.body:
Eons ago, over a span beyond reckoning.

  • Light fills the void; the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.5Kym1qDHTmM8XUQ6]{Things Below} were already there
  • First Creators become aware of themselves ?
  • The first of the great spirits arise
  • Things Below stoke the Creators’ egos, urge war
  • First Creators forge the world and trap the Things Below inside
  • Tcaventes, Shackle and Key, is set to guard the Utterwell ?
  • The gods do many legendary things ?
  • The earliest peoples evolve or are created

sections.heading: Time of the Makers
sections.body:
Millennia ago, over a span of centuries (at least).

  • Rise of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.wsIFXTjnJFgO6vnI]{Tempest Lords}’ civilization
  • Tempest Lords establish their empire
  • Rise of other Maker groups
  • Tempest Lords found “Northernmost” (the Ruins at Road’s End, page 87)
  • Tempest Lord homeland sinks, empire crumbles; other @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.eoTIBDMIzJXByPCZ]{Makers} grow in power ?
  • Construction of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.ezquwGFbne6uxzJK]{Makers’ Roads} begins ?
  • @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.VosjScKksp5B3hsc]{Green Lords} breed the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.Ej5WiMs30baKNXW3]{Fae} ?
  • Manmarchers come from across the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.lGNIQWIn8CPHuM7E]{Dread River}
  • Stormcatcher establishes her Tower in the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.nBvsH19B1bG2d4Di]{Flats}
  • Fae rebellion! the Green Lords call on the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.5Kym1qDHTmM8XUQ6]{Things Below}
  • @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.rJiU3RhbILojTC2u]{Stone Lords} destroy the heart of the Green Lord’s territory, creating what is now @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.UstvXnD6EA9IBBO3]{Ferrier’s Fen}
  • Siege of @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.76FKkdtTFxWEGIKQ]{Vor Svetelik}; Green Lords retreat, become @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.lB57gclVP4TiOIRb]{Fomoraij}
  • Stone Lords’ servants start to plot rebellion and embrace the Things Below

Were the civilizations of the South founded during the Time of the Makers, or even before? Or perhaps during the Time of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.JDCcrvQhMYFFlUIe]{Barrow Builders}?

Most events are listed in the order they occurred, but events in italics and starting with ? are approximate, their specific placement unclear. Did construction begin on the Makers’ Roads before or after the Tempest Lords’ capital sank? Did Brennan become @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge}’s marshal before or after the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.wxslMExj4dQkTPfw]{Forest Folk} disappeared? That’s for you and your group to decide, if it matters.

sections.heading: Time of Cataclysm
sections.body:
Centuries ago, over a span of decades.

  • @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.rJiU3RhbILojTC2u]{Stone Lords}’ servants rebel, unleash the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.5Kym1qDHTmM8XUQ6]{Things Below}, sink Dulenn and create @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.25HD51CKompWLFvB]{Blackwater Lake} ?
  • “Northernmost” overrun by horrors from the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.lGNIQWIn8CPHuM7E]{Dread River}
  • Stone Lords hunted down by rebels
  • Teirstered falls, becomes @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.zUeBMA1XS4Lq3KdK]{Three Coven Lake}
  • Refugees start heading to Stormcatcher’s tower ?
  • Howling Curse causes Rime Lord civilization to nearly collapse ?
  • Volcanic eruptions, Moratia Rubra destroyed, Forge Lord society collapses
  • More refugees arrive at Stormcatcher’s tower
  • Surviving @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.oi5Mg2wPABRjvHri]{Rime Lords} sacrifice themselves to contain the Howling Curse
  • Stormcatcher’s tower falls

sections.heading: Time of the Barrow Builders
sections.body:
Centuries ago, over a span of generations.

  • First barrows built to honor freedom fighters
  • Emanations of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.5Kym1qDHTmM8XUQ6]{Things Below} roam freely, are worshipped/appeased
  • Warlords/sorcerer-kings vie for power, build more elaborate barrows
  • Battles fought over @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.zUeBMA1XS4Lq3KdK]{Three Coven Lake}, the Ruins at Road’s End, etc.
  • Refugees, enslavement, human sacrifice, all-around bad times
  • Subjects of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.JDCcrvQhMYFFlUIe]{Barrow Builders} overthrow/abandon/imprison their tyrannical rulers
  • Certain bands of Barrow Builders flee into the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.v4slCO5mFJLcZO1q]{Labyrinth}

sections.heading: The Current Age
sections.body:
Starting a few centuries ago.

  • Power of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.5Kym1qDHTmM8XUQ6]{Things Below} ebbs (reasons unclear)
  • Barrow Builder culture gives rise to @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.NS2bhYMi23m0eWao]{Hillfolk} culture ?
  • @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge} founded ?
  • @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6yScslDfqrcCQ6CJ]{Stonetop} founded
  • Region stabilizes, trade routes established
  • @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.HesP5wBhjA0l9Ffk]{Gordin’s Delve} settled, Foundry established

sections.heading: Recent memory
sections.body:
The last decade or so.

  • ?
  • Brennan and the Claws start raiding
  • Earthquakes become more common
  • @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.wxslMExj4dQkTPfw]{Forest Folk} disappear ?
  • Brennan hired as @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge}’s marshal

Crinwin, nailadd, etc. grow in numbers
